title: Trojan Reach Travel Hazard / Complication
note: Draw when a jump/travel leg or an Adventure-Feature slot calls for a Reach complication. The frontier bites; pre-commit stakes, then resolve with the System Profile or a Fate Question.

entries.value: Misjump or drive trouble — the wayward J-drive throws the jump (Astrogation/Engineer check; off-course in lawless space)
Ion storm or radiation flare — sensors blind, hull stress, jump masked or scrambled
Fuel shortage — no skimmable giant or hostile port; rationing, wilderness refuel risk
Imperial patrol or customs inspection — papers, cargo, the marque means nothing to them
Aslan war-fleet or ihatei craft crossing the lane — honour, threat, or opportunity
Derelict or salvage — a drifting hull, a debris field, lost cargo (and who else is looking)
Distress call — a genuine rescue, a patron hook, or pirate bait
Sindalian ruin or lost-tech site — a vault, a relic, a hazard the dead Empire left behind
A rival pirate crew working the same hunting ground — contest, parley, or blood
Plague-zone, quarantine, or a hostile world's defences — the Reach's many ways to die
